patch.value: Track the July 6, 2026 fleet pass: align package metadata with latest pm CLI/SDK and pm-changelog, verify daily release automation, run build/test/audit/package checks with real workspace data where practical, inspect GitHub state, and record privacy/history findings without changing pm-cli itself.
July 6, 2026 fleet readiness pass for the pm package ecosystem.
Package uses current pm CLI/SDK and pm-changelog; release/check scripts pass; pm items capture decisions; no tracked secrets/private data are introduced; GitHub PR/release state is reviewed.

message: Resume canonical ecosystem readiness item for pm CLI 2026.7.11 alignment, TypeScript 7 validation, real-data tests, and release review

author: codex

value.author: codex
value.text: Filed https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/516 with a minimal reproduction. Updated integration coverage to assert pm-changelog itself is installed, active, and runtime-active under isolated diagnostics.

value.author: codex
value.text: pm 2026.7.11 can seed unrelated project-managed packages during plain init despite a fresh PM_GLOBAL_PATH; --isolated then correctly describes those leaked project packages. Upstream issue #516 filed. Package tests must assert the target extension identity/activation, not a machine-dependent aggregate count.

GitHub Dependabot/secret alerts zero; code scanning not configured. Tracked/full-history credential scans zero; no private host/path patterns in history.
